name: Brim, Jefferson
resolved_employer: Brim & Brim, P.C. (Jefferson K. 'Jay' Brim III), Austin attorney
evidence: Jefferson K. Brim III ('Jay') is a 40+ year Austin litigator at boutique firm Brim & Brim, P.C. (formerly Brim, Robinett & Brim) practicing employment, civil rights, education and administrative/licensure law, representing employees and licensed professionals. Distinctive name and gifts to Travis County Democrats (Travillion, Howard) fit; no zip on record so identity is inferential.

name: Farrell, Thomas
evidence: Thom Farrell served four terms as mayor of the small city of Rollingwood (78746) and retired Nov 2016; a prolific Democratic donor (238 FEC gifts, ~99% Dem lean) whose Rollingwood residence and civic profile match this donor. His private-sector career is not documented, so classification rests on his elected/civic identity.

name: Vanbavel, Linda
resolved_employer: Linda Van Bavel, Austin attorney (business/civil law; license inactive)
evidence: Linda Van Bavel is a Texas-licensed attorney (bar 1994) and solo practitioner at 213 W 41st St, Austin, TX 78751 - an exact zip match to the donor - practicing business law; State Bar shows her license currently inactive (semi-retired). Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: Schweinfurth, Stephanie
resolved_employer: Community volunteer (literacy nonprofits); VP, Austin City Lutherans; board co-chair, BookSpring
evidence: Stephanie Schweinfurth is a longtime literacy-focused community volunteer who moved to Austin from Dallas (co-founded Readers 2 Leaders in Dallas), now serves as VP of Austin City Lutherans and events co-chair on BookSpring's board. Volunteer rather than salaried; identity for this no-zip 2021 gift to Ann Howard is inferential (likely same person as the 78704 record below).

name: Shaya, Kareem
resolved_employer: Co-founder, Open Source Defense; software engineer (Stripe, ex-Warby Parker)
evidence: Kareem Shaya is the Austin-based (78702) co-founder of Open Source Defense, a tech-forward gun-rights advocacy media/newsletter org, and a career software engineer (engineering manager at Stripe, second engineer at Warby Parker). Distinctive name and Austin location corroborate. Notably a gun-rights figure who donated to Democrat Ann Howard.

name: Phillips, David
evidence: Very common name in the Oak Hill 78736 area; multiple distinct David Phillips exist in Austin (physician, real-estate agent, Motorola/Dell engineer, foundation head). This is a prolific donor (679 FEC gifts, giving through Nov 2025), but no detail uniquely identifies which David Phillips, so no confident classification.

name: Schweinfurth, Stephanie
resolved_employer: Community volunteer (literacy nonprofits); VP, Austin City Lutherans; board co-chair, BookSpring
evidence: Same Stephanie Schweinfurth as the other batch record: a literacy-focused community volunteer (Dallas transplant) active on Austin nonprofit boards (BookSpring, Austin City Lutherans). Austin 78704 address is consistent with her south/central Austin profile; volunteer rather than employed.

name: Saldaa, Paul
evidence: Paul M. Saldana is a well-known Austin political/PR consultant - president of Saldana Public Relations, former AISD District 6 trustee and board VP (2014-2017), and former chief of staff to Mayor Gus Garcia. Longtime local political operative; gift to Brigid Shea fits. Manchaca/78652 is consistent with his Austin-area residence.

name: Bingham, Alfred
resolved_employer: Registered Texas lobbyist (government affairs), longtime lobbyist for NRG Energy
evidence: Alfred L. Bingham Jr. is a long-registered Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist (2010-2026 lists) whose clients include NRG Energy, Inc.; the Bingham family is tied to the 78749 residential address matching this donor. His identity is a government-affairs/energy-sector lobbyist. Gave to Jeff Travillion. Identity link between the downtown-registered lobbyist and the 78749 residence is inferential.

name: Pope, Edwin
evidence: Could not uniquely confirm this Leander (78641) donor. Candidates named Edwin Pope in the Austin area include a tech entrepreneur (president of DigitalGenetix, MBA Vanderbilt) and a pastor/musician, but no source ties either to the Leander address or to the Travillion gift. No confident classification.

name: Reyes, Rico
resolved_employer: Rico C. Reyes, attorney (commercial/business litigation); U.S. Marine Corps reservist; former Travis County ADA
evidence: Rico C. Reyes is a Pflugerville (78660) attorney in commercial/general business litigation, a U.S. Marine Corps reservist (former Major) and former Travis County Assistant DA who helped establish the Veterans' Court and ran for Texas House District 50 in 2013. Pflugerville residence (10+ years) and profile match. Military service is personal (reservist/veteran), not defense-contractor industry.

name: Johnson, Jennifer
evidence: Extremely common name; the identifiable Austin attorney Jennifer Piskun Johnson is in 78703, not the donor's 78750, and no other source ties a specific Jennifer Johnson to 78750 with a corroborating occupation. Cannot confidently identify, so no classification despite the moderate FEC donation history.
